product_overview: A teacher-focused web app for managing classrooms, student rosters, attendance, grading, and academic risk insights. It also supports demo access and AI-generated student performance analysis.
core_goals: Sign in or enter the portal through demo mode
Create and configure classrooms with grading rules and behavior settings
Manage student rosters individually and through Excel import/export
Record daily attendance for students by session date
Create assignments and enter student scores in a gradebook
Review dashboards, risk flags, and class analytics
Generate AI-based student performance summaries and recommendations

features.name: Teacher Login & Demo Mode
features.description: Allows teachers to access the system with email/password authentication or enter immediately using seeded demo data.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter email and password -> Submit the login or signup form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to / -> Choose Demo Mode login -> Enter the portal with sample classroom data

features.name: Classroom & Grade Configuration
features.description: Lets users create classrooms and configure semester length, grading weights, grade thresholds, and behavior deduction settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /classes -> Add a new classroom -> Set the classroom schedule and semester weeks -> Adjust homework, exam, and behavior weights -> Configure grade thresholds and behavior settings -> Save settings

features.name: Student Roster Management with Excel Import/Export
features.description: Supports adding, editing, deleting, importing, and exporting student roster data for a classroom.
user_flows: Navigate to /students -> Add a new student -> Enter student code, prefix, name, and notes -> Save the student -> See the roster update
Navigate to /students -> Edit an existing student -> Update the student details -> Save changes -> See the updated roster
Navigate to /students -> Delete a student -> Confirm removal -> See the student removed from the roster
Navigate to /students -> Import student data from Excel -> Select a roster file -> Review the imported entries -> See the roster populated with new students
Navigate to /students -> Export the roster to Excel -> Download the current student list

features.name: Attendance Tracking
features.description: Records daily attendance status for each student and shows session-based attendance logs and calculations.
user_flows: Navigate to /attendance -> Select a date -> Set attendance status for each student -> Save attendance -> See the session log update
Navigate to /attendance -> Select a date -> Mark all students as present -> Save attendance -> See the class recorded for the session

features.name: Gradebook & Scores Input
features.description: Lets teachers create assignments, enter student scores, mark late submissions, and view calculated grade components.
user_flows: Navigate to /gradebook -> Create a new assignment -> Enter the assignment name, component, and maximum score -> Save the assignment -> See the new gradebook column appear
Navigate to /gradebook -> Select a student score cell -> Enter a score -> Mark the submission as late when needed -> Save scores -> See the grade totals recalculate

features.name: Dashboard Analytics & Risk Overview
features.description: Shows classroom analytics such as attendance rates, grade distributions, risk levels, and alerts.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Review attendance and grade charts -> Observe risk indicators and classroom alerts -> Identify students needing attention

features.name: AI Student Insights
features.description: Generates an AI-based performance summary, strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations for a selected student using Google Gemini.
user_flows: Navigate to /ai-insights -> Choose a student -> Generate AI analysis -> Review the performance summary, strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations
Navigate to /ai-insights -> Choose a student -> Generate AI analysis -> Save the generated report

features.name: Reports Export
features.description: Produces student report cards and transcripts that can be exported for external use.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> Generate a report card or transcript -> Export the result as PDF or Excel

routes.description: Login and signup page for teachers with a Demo Mode entry point.
Main dashboard showing class analytics, attendance rates, grade distributions, risk assessments, and classroom alerts.
Manage classrooms, configure grading weights (homework, exams, behavior), set grade thresholds, and manage behavior configuration.
View, add, edit, and delete student rosters, including importing and exporting via Excel templates.
Record and track daily student attendance (present, late, sick, absent) and view session logs.
Manage assignments, enter/update student scores, toggle late status, and calculate component grades.
Generate and export PDF grade report cards and Excel transcripts.
View AI performance summaries, strengths, weaknesses, and academic recommendations per student using Google Gemini.

features.name: Teacher Login & Demo Mode
features.description: Authenticate using Supabase Auth or access the application instantly using Local Storage-backed Demo Mode.
user_interactions: Click login/signup or choose Demo Mode login.

features.name: Classroom & Grade Configuration
features.description: Create classrooms, set total weeks, define grade component weights, and configure grade letter boundaries.
user_interactions: Adjust homework, exams, and behavior weights.

features.name: Student Roster Excel Import/Export
features.description: Manage students roster with options to batch import/export via Excel sheet.

features.name: Attendance Tracking
features.description: Track daily student attendance status with automatic late session deduction calculation.

features.name: Gradebook & Scores Input
features.description: Input scores for assignments and exams, supporting late submission indicators.

features.name: AI Report Generator
features.description: Analyze student data and generate a structured performance summary, strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations using Google Gemini.
user_interactions: View and save the generated report.

known_limitations.issue: Fallback Demo Mode utilizes local storage only.
known_limitations.impact: Data is not shared across devices or persisted permanently if browser cache is cleared.
